title: Website development
paragraphs: I develop multi-page websites, corporate sites, landing pages, portfolios, blogs, and online stores — always with performance, accessibility, and SEO in mind.
For each project, I pick the perfect tech stack — custom code from scratch or no/low-code platforms like Webflow, Webstudio, Shopify or Framer, depending on your goals.

title: Website Upgrades
paragraphs: Is your site loading slowly, not ranking well, underperforming, or looking outdated? I'll pinpoint what's holding it back and make it work harder for your business. From complete redesigns to precise technical improvements, I make websites faster, more engaging, and easier to grow.
Performance optimization, SEO improvements, design updates, engaging animations, better user experience, and accessibility improvements — everything your site needs to reach its full potential.

title: Web Design
paragraphs: Design isn't my specialty, though I designed this site myself.

That's why I partner with skilled and reliable designers who create visuals that make you stand out from the crowd and boost your conversions. Together, we create websites that don't just look good — they work hard to grow your business.
